nasb.text: so that your fasting will not be noticed by men, but by your Father who is in secret; and your Father who sees what is done in secret will reward you.

esv.text: that your fasting may not be seen by others but by your Father who is in secret. And your Father who sees in secret will reward you.

cnv.text: 不要叫人看出你在禁食，只讓在隱密中的父看見。你父在隱密中察看，必定報答你。

ccb.text: 不叫人们看出你在禁食，只让你肉眼看不见的父知道，鉴察隐秘事的父必赏赐你。

csbs.text: 免得被人看出你在禁食；你反而要让你在隐秘中的父看见。这样，你那在隐秘中察看的父就将回报你。
